issue.title: [Feature]: Restrict review panels to 2-provider fast-review tier
issue.body:
## Work Type
Refactor (SOP amendment) - review panels use glm + deepseek only.

## Problem / Goal
The orchestrator currently dispatches a four-provider review panel. The slowest
provider sets each workflow loop's wall-clock cost. This issue changes the
automation policy for plan-review and code-review panels.

## Expected Outcome
- TRN-1008 SOP text is amended.
- CHANGELOG is updated.
- Provider unavailability rules are updated.
- Review panel examples are updated.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Plan-review panel provider list reduced.
- [ ] Code-review panel provider list reduced.
- [ ] PASS gate threshold updated.
- [ ] FailureModes text updated.
- [ ] Guard Rails text updated.
- [ ] Threat Model text updated.
- [ ] Examples updated.
- [ ] Change History updated.
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added.
